169.reason: [The multiplication function does not handle the case where intermediate terms cancel out (coefficient becomes zero), leading to zero-coefficient terms in the result, which should be removed according to the problem statement that only non-zero terms are included.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The multiplication function does not handle the case where intermediate terms cancel out (coefficient becomes zero), leading to zero-coefficient terms in the result, which should be removed according to the problem statement that only non-zero terms are included.]

98.reason: [After processing one term of s1, cur2 must be reset to the beginning of s2 for the next iteration. Without this reset, the inner loop will not execute for subsequent terms of s1 because cur2 becomes NULL after the first full pass.]
